questions.text: What is the primary memory bottleneck resolved by Multi-Query Attention (MQA)?
options: KV Cache storage and memory bandwidth during autoregressive decoding.
questions.correct_answer: KV Cache storage and memory bandwidth during autoregressive decoding.
questions.explanation: MQA uses a single key-value head, drastically reducing the KV Cache memory footprint and accelerating inference memory read-write bounds.
